$description: Easing curve tokens. Both codebases predominantly use ease/ease-out.

default.$description: General-purpose. Used by www hover-lift, hover-scale, team-member transitions.

out.$description: Entrance animations. Used by www slide-up, Patina reference-line-label.

linear.$description: Continuous rotation. Used by Patina spin-around.

reveal-cubic.$description: Cubic ease-out, 1 - (1 - t)^3. Used for Canvas viewport-entry reveals (Lissajous trace, ResolutionComparison scrub). Hits 87% of the travel in the first half — the reveal reads as decisive, not sluggish.
